raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet kas us Elkeem va-
kanjahs/ kas us leetahm Bil-
dehtm fakka : Juhs eſtat muhſu
Deewi/ teem buhs atpakkat gree-
stees/ un taps ar Kaunu Kanná
darriti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Klaufajt juhs Kurlee/ nn
flattajtees juhs Aklee/ ka juhs
redſeht warrat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kas irr tik akls ka mans
Kalps? un kuris ka mans Wehst-
neſsis/ ko es fuhtu? kas irr tik
akls ka tas Pilnigajs? un akls
ka ta KUNGA Kalps?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee gann dauds Leetas
reds/ bet ne farga / ( jepſchu )
winsch tahs Aufis atdarra/ to-
mebr tee ne klanfa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tam KUNGAM btja
labs Prahts ( pee teem) fawas
Taitnibas deht/ winsch pa-aug-
stinaja(tohs) zaur * to Baufit-
bu/ nn apgohdinaja tohs.
* Ko wiſsch zaur Mohsu dewe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet nu irr tee pohſtiti
un aplaupiti Zaudis/ tee irr wiſſ-
notux fawalosinati Allás/ un
apflehpti Zeetuma Namindś/ tee
irr par Laupijumu tappuſchi/
un neweens irr/ kas tohs is-
glahbj/ par weenn Pohſticha-
nu/ un neweens irr/ kas fakka:
Atdohd atpakkat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kurſeb juhsu Starpá leek
to wehra/ kas usmannu un klau-
fa/ kas wehl parkat buhs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kas irr Jehkabu par Boh-
ſitchanu nodewis/ un Isräelit
par Laupijumu? neggi tas
KUNGS? tas/ prett ko mehs
eſtim greheſojufchi/ jo tee ne grib-
beja us winna Zelfeem staigahrt/
un ne klaufija winna Baufitbai.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz irr winsch pahr
teem iſgahfis to Bahrsibu fa-
was Dufintibas/ un to Karra
Warru/ un irr tohs wiſsapkahrt
fadedſinajs/ bet tee to ne atſihſt/
un irr tohs eededſinajs/ bet tee to
ne nemm pee Sirde.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Et nu ta fakka tas
KUNGS taws Raddi-
Stajes/ ak Jehkab! un
taws Darritajs/ ak Israél: Ne
bihſtees/ jo es eſmu tewi atpe-
ſtijs/ es eſmu tewi pee taiva
Wahrdá fauzis/tumanpeederri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad tu zaur Uhdeni eefi/
buhſchu es pee tewis / un zaur
Uppehm/ tad tahs pahr tewi ne
pluhdihs. Rad tu zaur Ugguni
eefi/ tad tu ne fadegfi/ un ta Lees-
ma tewi ne aisdedſinahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es eſmu tas KUNGS
taws Deews/tas Swehtajs eeffch
Israëla taws Pestitajs. Es eſ-
mu Egiptes-Semini / Mohen-
Semini un Sebu par Iſpirk-
fchanas
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
